news.headline: Solar Landscape Secures $600 Million for Distributed Solar Deployment

news.headline: MNRE Mandates 10-Year Warranty, 25-Year Performance Cover for Solar Modules
news.summary: The Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE) has issued a standard procedure for warranty management and claims settlement for solar modules installed under distributed renewable energy programs, mandating a 10-year product warranty and a 25-year power output warranty.

news.headline: Ballard’s Revenue Up 26% in Q1 2026 on Higher Fuel Cell Shipments
news.summary: Fuel cell manufacturer Ballard Power Systems’ revenue surged 26% year-over-year (YoY) to $19.4 million in the first quarter (Q1) of 2026, from $15.4 million on the back of higher deliveries to its rail and bus verticals. news.headline: SolarEdge’s Q1 Revenue Rises 41.5% YoY on Higher Inverter and Battery Shipments
news.summary: Israel-based solar inverter manufacturer SolarEdge reported revenues of $310.5 million in the first quarter (Q1) of 2026, a 41.5% year-over-year (YoY) jump from $219.5 million and beating analysts’ expectations by $5.03 million. news.headline: Fluence Energy’s Revenue Rises 8% YoY to $465 Million in Q2 2026
news.summary: Listen to this article Utility-scale energy storage firm Fluence Energy reported revenue of $464.9 million for the second quarter (Q2) of fiscal year 2026, a 7.7%

news.headline: REC Silicon Posts Lower Q1 Revenue as Oversupply Pressures Persist
news.summary: Norway-based silicon material manufacturer REC Silicon reported revenue of $19.5 million in the first quarter (Q1) of 2026, down 8.9% from $21.4 million in the same period last year.

news.headline: Pricing Pressure Pushes Flux Power’s Revenue Down 61% YoY in Q3 FY 2026
news.summary: Lithium-ion storage solutions provider Flux Power has reported revenue of $6.59 million in the third quarter (Q3) of the fiscal year (FY) 2026, down 60.7% year-over-year (YoY) from $16.7 million. The revenue fell short of analyst expectations of $10.1 million.

news.headline: Apple to Invest ₹1 Billion in CleanMax for 150 MW Renewable Energy Projects

news.headline: ACME Solar’s Q4 Revenue Rises 12.5% on Capacity Additions, Higher CUF
news.summary: Gurgaon-based independent power producer ACME Solar Holdings has reported a revenue of ₹5.48 billion (~$58.05 million) in the fourth quarter of the financial year (FY) 2026, a 12.5% year-over-year (YoY) jump from ₹4.87 billion (~$51.59 million). news.headline: SEG Solar to Build 4 GW Solar Module Manufacturing Facility in Houston
news.summary: SEG Solar, a California-based solar module manufacturer, has announced plans to establish a 4 GW solar module manufacturing facility in Houston, Texas.
